title: Genetic Algorithm
description:
Gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by 3.
upgraded_description:
Gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by 4.
notes: This card maintains state across the run. Each time it's played, it gains a permanent +Block increase, so future plays grant more Block. Initial block gain is 1, which increases by the Increase value (3/4) with each play.
